capabilities: Combine insights from benchmark testing and agent planning KBs to create a unified testing procedure that ensures accuracy and efficiency.

procedure.action: Reconcile artifacts from benchmark testing and agent planning by using domain-specific tools like Apache JMeter; ensure all shared steps are aligned and log discrepancies to merge_log by applying field-level structural comparison on shared key fields; flag conflicts where hash(A.field) != hash(B.field) and log to conflict_log; assert merge_error_count < 1.

Assert the merged output by running JSON Schema draft-07 validation on all fields; emit VALIDATION_FAILED with field path on the first failing field by asserting all required fields conform to the schema definition; emit VALIDATION_FAILED with field path on the first failing field; assert field_validation_pass_rate >= 1.0.
Filter candidate anomalies by applying statistical analysis on operation_duration_ms; flag any outliers beyond 3 standard deviations and log to anomaly_log.
Assign results by using a machine learning model trained on historical data; ensure classification accuracy > 95% and log misclassifications to classification_log.

Log operation_duration_ms and result_code for each test case to an audit trail; ensure logs are stored in a secure, immutable format for compliance using domain-appropriate tooling; assert error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.

summary: Integrate benchmark testing with agent planning derived knowledge base by merging workflows and validating outputs using domain-specific tools.
title: Benchmark Testing

failureConditions: Inconsistent data when merge omits NULL handling: records with NULL key fields are silently dropped, causing referential integrity violations in downstream consumers.
Inaccurate classification when model is not updated with recent data, causing misclassification and incorrect decision-making.
Anomalies undetected when statistical thresholds are not properly set, leading to unnoticed performance degradation.
metrics: the merged output by running JSON Schema draft-07 validation on all fields
